Bug / Task Description: Three related correctness and performance fixes in the CRDT and clock layers. (1) Fix observed-remove convergence in pkg/crdt: ORSet.Remove and ORMap.Delete currently drop entries only on the local replica, so a removal is silently undone the next time state is merged in from a replica that still holds the element. Track removals (per observed add) so that a delete observed by one replica converges across merges and stays removed, while a concurrent add that carries a tag the remover never observed still survives (add-wins). (2) In pkg/crdt, make GCounter.Value and PNCounter.Value O(1) instead of O(n) map iteration by maintaining a cached running total kept consistent across Increment, Decrement, and Merge, without changing any returned value. (3) In pkg/clock, make HybridLogicalClock.Tick and Witness allocation-free on the hot path by updating the clock's stored last timestamp in place, without changing produced timestamps or causal ordering. Preserve all exported names, signatures, and serialization formats.
Commit Subject: fix(crdt): observed-remove convergence and cached counter/clock fast paths
